title: execute_tactus tool description rewrite + themed docs
description: Rewrite the execute_tactus MCP tool description to a curated example-driven boot prompt, add a discovery example pointing at api.list/docs.list/docs.get, reorganize plexus/docs/ into Tactus-native theme subdirectories (overview, discovery, read-apis, long-running-apis, handles-and-budgets, score-and-dataset-authoring/, evaluation-and-feedback/, procedures/, reports/), and keep the existing get_plexus_documentation tool resolving every current key for backward compatibility during the transition.
